name: mikrochat
description: The minimalist chat app that's all yours
author: Mikael Vesavuori

scripts.dev: npm run build:web && concurrently "npm run dev:web:serve" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:web && npm run dev:web:serve
scripts.dev:https: npm run build:web && http-server dist -a ${HOST:-127.0.0.1} -p ${PORT:-8000} -S -C cert.pem -c-1
scripts.dev:reload: npm run build:web && cp dist/mikrochat.min.js app/mikrochat.min.js && clear && npm run dev:api
scripts.docs: npm run docs:install && npm --prefix docs run dev
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:install && npm --prefix docs run build
scripts.docs:preview: npm run docs:install && npm --prefix docs run preview
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run sbom && npm run scan && npm run licenses && npm run release:assets
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:frontend && npm run deploy:backend
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.lint: biome lint app src tests scripts build.mjs esbuild.config.mjs vitest.config.mts package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json biome.json mikrochat.config.example.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome lint app src tests scripts build.mjs esbuild.config.mjs vitest.config.mts package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json biome.json mikrochat.config.example.json --write
scripts.format: biome format --write app src tests scripts build.mjs esbuild.config.mjs vitest.config.mts package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json biome.json mikrochat.config.example.json
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run docs:build
scripts.licenses: mkdir -p security && grant check security/sbom.spdx.json --config .grant.yaml > security/grant-report.txt || { cat security/grant-report.txt; exit 1; }
scripts.scan: mkdir -p security && grype sbom:security/sbom.spdx.json -o json > security/grype-report.json
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
